name: rule-engine closed-loop step suppression flows an inline-suppression event into the friction tracker
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/closed-loop-test.sh" --step suppression --rule-id no-eval --justification migration-temp --friction-log .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"event":"inline-suppression"' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q '"rule_id":"no-eval"' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
